name: @strav-tests/m4_5-broadcast
description: M4.5 end-to-end smoke — boots PostgresBroadcastProvider + NotificationProvider + BroadcastNotificationProvider against real Postgres. Proves the polling backplane fans events across the boundary (publisher → ledger row → poller → in-process subscriber), the SSE response runtime wraps the resulting AsyncIterable, and the broadcast notification channel reaches end consumers via NotificationManager.send.
